mapper.select: /** UsptCnvnTaskInfoHistDao.selectMaxHist */ select a.* from ( select cnvn_task_info_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id ,task_nm_ko ,task_nm_en ,apply_field ,row_number() over (order by created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_cnvn_task_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id = '') ) a where a.rn = 1

/** UsptCnvnTaskInfoHistDao.selectUsptCnvnTaskInfoHistChangeDe */ select cnvn_change_req_id , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as change_de , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') as change_dt from uspt_cnvn_task_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id ='') /*변경전정보는 제외*/ order by created_dt desc

/** UsptCnvnTaskInfoHistDao.selectUsptCnvnTaskInfoHistByDt */ select 'before' as change_be_af , cnvn_task_info_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id ,task_nm_ko ,task_nm_en ,apply_field ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_cnvn_task_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id is not null and confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id !='' union all select 'after' as change_be_af ,cnvn_task_info_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id ,task_nm_ko ,task_nm_en ,apply_field ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_cnvn_task_info_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_task_info_hist_id = '') and to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') = #{changeDt}
